global.description: The ad features a bold red background with food icons and promotional text.
global.main_message: Order dinner quickly with free delivery over $15.

elements.label: Solid red background
elements.description: A vibrant solid red background fills the entire banner, creating a bold visual impact.

elements.label: CraveLoop logo
elements.description: The logo features the word 'CraveLoop' in a modern font, prominently displayed at the top of the banner.

elements.label: Three food items
elements.description: Three stylized food item icons are arranged in a row, suggesting a variety of meal options.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small yellow circular badge with the word 'SALE' in bold text, positioned at the top right corner.

elements.label: Food item icon
elements.description: A single stylized food item icon, representing a meal, centered in the middle of the banner.

elements.label: Food item icon
elements.description: Another stylized food item icon, similar to the previous one, positioned to the right of the center.

elements.label: Food item icon
elements.description: A third stylized food item icon, positioned to the left of the center, completing the trio.

elements.label: Dinner offer text
elements.description: The text 'Dinner in minutes Free delivery over $15' is displayed in a large, clear font at the center of the banner.
elements.text_content: Dinner in minutes Free delivery over $15

elements.label: CraveLoop logo
elements.description: The 'CraveLoop' logo appears at the top of the banner, designed in a modern and appealing style.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom of the banner with the text 'Try for free' in a bold font, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: SALE text
elements.description: The word 'SALE' is displayed in a small yellow badge, emphasizing a promotional offer.
